name: weathervane
description: The open analytics layer that sends nothing. Zero-backend behavioral telemetry — pageviews, content exposure, clicks, forms, sessions, and web vitals emitted as structured CustomEvents you forward anywhere.
author: Alec Rothman

scripts.build: npx terser weathervane.js --compress --mangle -o weathervane.min.js && gzip -9 -kf weathervane.min.js
